# Page 2^page=2
Payments & fees Insurance, taxes, gov’t fees $26.29 Insurance: To comply with government-mandated regulations, Lyft maintains commercial auto insurance on behalf of drivers. This is in addition to your personal auto insurance, which typically does not cover accidents while you’re driving with Lyft. The fee also covers additional risk-related costs for most accidents that occur when giving rides. Taxes & government fees: This includes taxes and fees imposed by federal, state, and local governments to operate the Lyft rideshare platform. An example includes fees charged to drop off passengers at an airport. Estimated Lyft fee $24.99 The amount collected by Lyft to promote the platform, provide customer service, support safety infrastructure, cover data hosting and card processing fees, make app improvements, and more. Passenger payments $288.47 The amount passengers paid for the rides you gave. This does not include tips, tolls, and other pass-throughs. Tips $13.48 The amount passengers tipped you for great service. You’ll always receive 100% of your tips. Weekly summary May 11 - May 17 Generated July 15, 2026 at 04:16 AM EDT Continued on next page Lyft 185 Berry Street Suite 5000 San Francisco CA 94107 Page 2 of 3 This isn't a tax document. Visit 'Tax Information' from your dashboard for details on taxes.

# Page 3^page=3
Total earnings: Your earnings after deductions. Booked distance: The total distance you spent giving rides—from accepting a ride to drop-off. Booked time: The total time you spent giving rides—from accepting a ride to drop-off. Online time: The total time you spent online, including time when you were waiting for rides. Earnings: The amount you made before any deductions. This includes ride earnings, tips, tolls, pass-throughs, and bonuses. Deductions: Fees deducted from your earnings such as Express Pay and Express Drive. Weekly summary May 11 - May 17 Generated July 15, 2026 at 04:16 AM EDT Lyft 185 Berry Street Suite 5000 San Francisco CA 94107 Page 3 of 3 This isn't a tax document. Visit 'Tax Information' from your dashboard for details on taxes.
